steps: The D&D builder has three main skills: 1) dnd-build creates level-1 D&D 2024 characters by answering guided questions about class, species, background, and ability scores. 2) dnd-check audits existing character sheets for rules errors. 3) dnd-lookup finds spells, feats, and class abilities in the 2024 catalogue. All values come from the bundled rules data, never from memory.
